loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for availability and energy consumption as a proxy for run-hours; duration and count metrics are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for average load percentage — run-hours, starts, and total run-hours are not directly measured by this electrical meter and are reported as partial.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active energy and power factor — MTBF and MTTR are duration/count metrics not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active power, reactive power, and energy history — readiness scores and thresholds are not measured by this electrical meter.
